title: Common Sense
description: A Wikisource source card for Common Sense by Thomas Paine.

pages.text: Common Sense is a persuasive Revolutionary-era pamphlet that argues for independence and shows how political writing can shape public opinion.
Use this source for excerpts on rhetoric, claims, evidence, audience, tone, and comparison with other revolutionary documents.
This older text is public domain, but use the Wikisource page to confirm edition notes and transcription details before mirroring excerpts.
